label: route-words-in-non-URL-context
title: Document the new backend service settings in the ops runbook
body:
# Document the new backend service settings

The ops runbook at `docs/ops/runbook.md` needs a new section describing the recent backend service settings changes (timeouts, retries, account management envelopes). This is a documentation-only change; no code surfaces move.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] AC-1: `docs/ops/runbook.md` has a new "Backend service settings" section with the timeouts and retry budget documented.
- [ ] AC-2: No UI or browser-facing change.
- [ ] AC-3: The words "settings", "account", and "dashboard" appear only in prose describing backend internals, not as routes.
